title: VERIFICATION_QUERY
description: Request from the Referee to a Keeper to verify stored hashes and timestamps for a specific terminal. The Referee MUST send one VERIFICATION_QUERY per party (Actor and Claimant separately), even when they use the same Keeper.

incident_id.description: Identifier of the incident subject to verification

requester_id.description: Terminal ID of the Referee sending this query.

target_terminal_id.description: Terminal ID of the party whose anchor records are to be verified. The Keeper MUST restrict the search to records submitted by this terminal.

target_hashes.description: Hash values of the evidence data to be verified.

original_timestamp_range.description: Time range within which the evidence is expected to have been stored. Applied to all hashes in target_hashes.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of when this query was sent.
